name: opt_cad_score_calculation_workflow
description: Calculate the OPT-CAD score for a coronary heart disease patient based on age, heart rate, and eight binary risk factors.

inputs.input_desc: Patient's heart rate in beats per minute
Presence of hypertension history. Allowed values: true, false
Prior myocardial infarction. Allowed values: true, false
Prior stroke. Allowed values: true, false
Renal insufficiency defined as eGFR < 60 ml/(min·1.73m²). Allowed values: true, false
Anemia (Male Hb < 13 g/dL, Female Hb < 12 g/dL). Allowed values: true, false
Left ventricular ejection fraction < 50%. Allowed values: true, false
Cardiac troponin above upper limit of normal. Allowed values: true, false
ECG ST-segment depression or elevation. Allowed values: true, false

steps.step_description: Calculate the score based on the patient's age group.
steps.reason: This step maps a patient's age to a predefined score based on clinical risk stratification tiers.
steps.detail: Age < 40: 0 points; 40-49: 9 points; 50-59: 29 points; 60-64: 41 points; 65-69: 50 points; 70-74: 58 points; 75-79: 65 points; >=80: 71 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate the score based on the patient's heart rate.

step_inputs.input_desc: Patient's heart rate in beats per minute

steps.reason: This step maps a patient's heart rate to a predefined score based on clinical risk stratification tiers.
steps.detail: Heart rate < 60 bpm: 0 points; 60-69 bpm: 14 points; 70-79 bpm: 18 points; 80-89 bpm: 21 points; 90-99 bpm: 24 points; 100-110 bpm: 30 points; > 110 bpm: 36 points.

steps.step_description: Calculate scores for the eight binary risk factors and sum them up.

step_inputs.input_desc: Presence of hypertension history. Allowed values: true, false
Prior myocardial infarction. Allowed values: true, false
Prior stroke. Allowed values: true, false
Renal insufficiency defined as eGFR < 60 ml/(min·1.73m²). Allowed values: true, false
Anemia (Male Hb < 13 g/dL, Female Hb < 12 g/dL). Allowed values: true, false
Left ventricular ejection fraction < 50%. Allowed values: true, false
Cardiac troponin above upper limit of normal. Allowed values: true, false
ECG ST-segment depression or elevation. Allowed values: true, false

step_outputs.output_desc: Sum of scores from all binary risk factors

steps.reason: This step evaluates eight independent clinical risk factors, assigning a fixed score to each if present, and sums them.
steps.detail: Sum points for each factor if true: Hypertension: 20 points; Prior MI: 16 points; Prior Stroke: 16 points; Renal insufficiency: 21 points; Anemia: 19 points; LVEF < 50%: 22 points; Elevated cTn: 23 points; ST-segment changes: 13 points. False yields 0 points for each.

steps.step_description: Sum all component scores to compute the final OPT-CAD score.

step_inputs.input_desc: Sum of scores from all binary risk factors

steps.reason: This step performs a simple summation of three integer scores to derive the final composite clinical score.
